steps.title: Read the bar chart values
steps.content: Gorner measures approximately 41 square km, Fiescher approximately 29 square km, and Unteraar approximately 22 square km.

steps.title: Determine the correct comparison
steps.content:
Gorner is the largest of the three glaciers, exceeding both Fiescher and Unteraar.
The other three choices contradict this ranking by incorrectly positioning Gorner relative to one or both of the other glaciers.
That is the correct answer.
